name: Gmail Inquiry to CRM Lead
description: JD Requirement: 'Build workflow automations using Zapier'. Converts incoming Gmail inquiries into CRM leads automatically.

config.search_query: subject:(inquiry OR interested OR test drive OR price) from:(-@company.com)
config.label: Customer Inquiries

payload.input: Extract customer name, phone, email, and vehicle interest from this email: {{Body_Plain}}

config.notes: Uses the Sales Agent to parse unstructured email into structured lead data

config.subject: Thank you for your interest!
config.body:
Dear {{step1.parsed_name}},

Thank you for reaching out about the {{step1.parsed_vehicle}}. A member of our sales team will contact you within the hour.

Best regards,
Sales Team

business_impact: Every email inquiry becomes a CRM lead automatically. No manual data entry. Auto-reply within seconds.
